create_session: create a new AI conversation session with a project directory and optional model and provider IDs
get_session: get an existing session by its ID from the session storage
list_sessions: list all session infos from the session storage
create_user_message: create and add a user message with text content and optional images to a session
get_messages_for_llm: get all session messages formatted as dicts ready for an LLM API call
